metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Base name used for deployed resources.
Foundry project name. Leave empty to default to {baseName}-project. Must be a plain string, not an ARM expression.
Foundry model deployment name used by all planning agents (Grok 4.3).
SKU used by the Foundry model deployment for the agents. Use GlobalStandard for serverless deployments; use a provisioned SKU only if it is available for the model and region.
Capacity units for the Foundry model deployment used by the agents. Increase this when agents fail with no_capacity during peak load.
Foundry model provider format for the agent reasoning model.
Grok 4.3 model name in the Foundry catalog.
Grok 4.3 model version in the Foundry catalog.
Foundry deployment name for the RAG embedding model (OpenAI text-embedding-3-small).
Foundry model provider format for the RAG embedding model.
OpenAI embedding model name in the Foundry catalog.
OpenAI embedding model version in the Foundry catalog.
Capacity units for the RAG embed deployment. Increase this for faster signal evidence indexing and fewer throttling failures.
Vector dimensions for Search indexes and embedding requests (1536 for text-embedding-3-small).
Foundry deployment name for the RAG rerank model.
Foundry model provider format for the RAG rerank model. xAI and OpenAI do not publish rerank models in Foundry; Cohere is the catalog fallback.
RAG rerank model name in the Foundry catalog.
RAG rerank model version in the Foundry catalog.
Capacity units for the RAG rerank deployment. Increase this for faster retrieval reranking and fewer throttling failures.
Agent memory store name for inventory planning workflow context.
Azure AI Search SKU for demo retrieval indexes.
Fabric workspace name. Required. Must be capacity-backed and accessible to the operator.
Fabric lakehouse name. Created at deploy time if missing.
UAMI resource ID. Must be created by setup-fabric-provision-identity.ps1 with Fabric workspace role.
When false, the lakehouse is still provisioned but no data is uploaded.
Repository archive URL for the seed script to download infra/scripts/ and dataset-seed/.
Optional GitHub PAT for private repos or higher rate limits.
Optional suffix for retry deployments. Set when redeploying after a partial failure left names reserved.
Azure region for the deployment script resource.
Resource tags.
Unique deployment suffix from naming module.
Whether to run the Fabric data seed.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity used for Fabric access.
Fabric workspace ID (from fabric-provision module).
Fabric workspace name.
Fabric lakehouse ID (from fabric-provision module).
Fabric lakehouse name.
Repository archive URL containing dataset-seed/ and infra/scripts/.
Optional GitHub PAT for private repos or higher rate limits.
